mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.id as cart_product_id, p.title as cart_product_title, p.price as cart_product_price, p.status as cart_product_status, p.seller_id as cart_product_seller_id, p.condition as cart_product_condition, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM cart c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, p.id as cart_product_id, p.title as cart_product_title, p.price as cart_product_price, p.status as cart_product_status, p.seller_id as cart_product_seller_id, p.condition as cart_product_condition, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM cart c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
